description:
A time tracker and timesheet app that lets you track work hours across projects.


- (New Feature) Undo option added for deleting and discarding entries.
- (Fix) Start/Stop shortcut.
- (Fix) Auto Tracker Idle column.
- (Fix) Auto Tracker not tracking URLs.
- (Fix) Description cannot be entered when app is maximized.
- (Fix) A regular user cannot continue an entry with an archived project.
- (Fix) When creating a new entry with a default project set, task is automatically added.
- (Fix) Default project picker missing some projects when task is required field.
- Other bug fixes and performance improvements.
